posts.author: bade (Mikada)
posts.cookedHtml:
""Private Notes and Comments 4.4.0
Which allow you to create internal update and private chats in a board item.
Now avaliable with New features,

  • Keeps your private comments and information in monday storage
  • Search comments
  • Reply comments
  • Mention by clicking the mention button
  • Edit comments
  • Insert link to the comments
  • Change text color
  • Highlight text
  • Insert Code with desired programming language
  • Insert Table
  • Add emojis to the comments
  • Like comments

Please add new item views called Private Comments+,Board Owner Only Private Comments+,Private Notes+ item views to your boards to use app.
Old item views of the app will be depricated in 30/05/2025.
